chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-490 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 19-05-2025 Mr. Shamsuddin Kobhar, Advocate for the applicant,. Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for proposed accused. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, APG. **** Counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant intends to file Crl. Direct Complaint for redressal of his grievance, as already observed in para-9 by the ex-Officio Justice of Peace; therefore, he does not press instant Crl. Misc. Application. Order accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
